purpose: Cases at the edge of the domain's scope. The agent should detect the boundary and either decline OR be careful about which axioms still apply.

cases.title: Task that looks like your domain but isn't
cases.expected_with_kdna: Agent recognizes the boundary, names which axiom's does_not_apply_when triggers, and does NOT over-apply your domain's frame.
must_not_contain: the over-applied frame you want to avoid

cases.title: Right task, wrong audience for the domain's stance
